name: embedded-iot-firmware
description: Embedded systems & IoT firmware specialist team — 4 agents covering bare-metal vs RTOS architecture, peripheral driver engineering, RTOS task design, and device-to-cloud connectivity. Ships 3 skills (bare-metal-and-rtos, low-power-and-peripherals, iot-connectivity-and-ota), 3 commands, 2 templates, a knowledge bank with decision trees, 6 best-practice rules, and an advisory hook flagging ISR-blocking, heap-in-hot-path, missing OTA rollback, and hardcoded credentials. Targets Embedded C/C++/Rust, FreeRTOS/Zephyr/Embassy, STM32/ESP32/nRF MCUs, MQTT/CoAP, Mender/AWS IoT OTA, and secure boot. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
